title: Agent OS Index v0 baseline

title: 同步全局 Skills 瘦身结果
summary: 按 approved-skill-cleanup-manifest-2026-07-10.json 移除 104 个全局/user skill 索引；保留插件/系统托管能力；qwen-code 仅留在磁盘但不作为 Codex 活动 skill；stale bailian-cli lock 记录已清理。

title_i18n.zh-CN: 同步全局 Skills 瘦身结果

summary_i18n.zh-CN: 按 approved-skill-cleanup-manifest-2026-07-10.json 移除 104 个全局/user skill 索引；保留插件/系统托管能力；qwen-code 仅留在磁盘但不作为 Codex 活动 skill；stale bailian-cli lock 记录已清理。
summary_i18n.en-US: Removed 104 global/user Skill index entries from approved-skill-cleanup-manifest-2026-07-10.json; retained plugin- and system-managed capabilities; kept qwen-code on disk but outside the active Codex surface; and cleared the stale bailian-cli lock record.

title: Published beautify-github-readme to the Skills Library
